mapper.sql: stockId, zhangfu, name, marketValue, tradeDate, current, open, high, low, close, preClose, pctChg, amplitude, vol, amount, turnoverRate, limitUp, limitDown, limitUpTimes, total, circulating, totalMarketValue, circulatingMarketValue, pe, pes, innerDisk, outerDisk, fastChg, recentChange, changeCount, selectDate, selfSelectedTime, reportDate, reportCount, qaCount, qaTime, brokerCount, time, status, tag, orivalue, nowvalue
mapper.select:
select
distinct
,
from stock_data
order by ${orderByClause}

select
distinct
from stock_data
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into stock_data (stockId, zhangfu, name, marketValue, tradeDate, current, open, high, low, close, preClose, pctChg, amplitude, vol, amount, turnoverRate, limitUp, limitDown, limitUpTimes, total, circulating, totalMarketValue, circulatingMarketValue, pe, pes, innerDisk, outerDisk, fastChg, recentChange, changeCount, selectDate, selfSelectedTime, reportDate, reportCount, qaCount, qaTime, brokerCount, time, status, tag, orivalue, nowvalue, tradeFive, subject, subjectCacheVos) values (#{stockid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zhangfu,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{marketvalue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{tradedate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{current,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{open,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{high,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{low,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{close,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{preclose,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{pctchg,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amplitude,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vol,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{turnoverrate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{limitup,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{limitdown,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{limituptimes,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{total,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{circulating,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{totalmarketvalue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{circulatingmarketvalue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{pe,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{pes,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{innerdisk,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outerdisk,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fastchg,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{recentchange,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{changecount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{selectdate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{selfselectedtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reportdate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reportcount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qacount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qatime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{brokercount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{time,jdbcType=TIME}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{tag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orivalue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{nowvalue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{tradefive,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{subject,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{subjectcachevos,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into stock_data
stockId,
zhangfu,
name,
marketValue,
tradeDate,
current,
open,
high,
low,
close,
preClose,
pctChg,
amplitude,
vol,
amount,
turnoverRate,
limitUp,
limitDown,
limitUpTimes,
total,
circulating,
totalMarketValue,
circulatingMarketValue,
pe,
pes,
innerDisk,
outerDisk,
fastChg,
recentChange,
changeCount,
selectDate,
selfSelectedTime,
reportDate,
reportCount,
qaCount,
qaTime,
brokerCount,
time,
status,
tag,
orivalue,
nowvalue,
tradeFive,
subject,
subjectCacheVos,

#{zhangfu,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{marketvalue,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{tradedate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{current,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{open,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{high,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{low,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{close,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{preclose,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{pctchg,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{amplitude,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{vol,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{turnoverrate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{limitup,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{limitdown,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{limituptimes,jdbcType=INTEGER},

#{circulating,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{totalmarketvalue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

#{selectdate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{selfselectedtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reportdate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reportcount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{qacount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{qatime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{brokercount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{time,jdbcType=TIME},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{tag,jdbcType=INTEGER},

#{subject,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{subjectcachevos,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update stock_data
stockId = #{record.stockid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
zhangfu = #{record.zhangfu,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
name = #{record.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
marketValue = #{record.marketvalue,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
tradeDate = #{record.tradedate,jdbcType=DATE},
current = #{record.current,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
open = #{record.open,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
high = #{record.high,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
low = #{record.low,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
close = #{record.close,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
preClose = #{record.preclose,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
pctChg = #{record.pctchg,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
amplitude = #{record.amplitude,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
vol = #{record.vol,jdbcType=BIGINT},
amount = #{record.amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
turnoverRate = #{record.turnoverrate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
limitUp = #{record.limitup,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
limitDown = #{record.limitdown,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
limitUpTimes = #{record.limituptimes,jdbcType=INTEGER},
total = #{record.total,jdbcType=BIGINT},
circulating = #{record.circulating,jdbcType=BIGINT},
totalMarketValue = #{record.totalmarketvalue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
circulatingMarketValue = #{record.circulatingmarketvalue,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
pe = #{record.pe,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
pes = #{record.pes,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
innerDisk = #{record.innerdisk,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
outerDisk = #{record.outerdisk,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
fastChg = #{record.fastchg,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
recentChange = #{record.recentchange,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
changeCount = #{record.changecount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
selectDate = #{record.selectdate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
selfSelectedTime = #{record.selfselectedtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reportDate = #{record.reportdate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reportCount = #{record.reportcount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qaCount = #{record.qacount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qaTime = #{record.qatime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
brokerCount = #{record.brokercount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
time = #{record.time,jdbcType=TIME},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
tag = #{record.tag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
orivalue = #{record.orivalue,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
nowvalue = #{record.nowvalue,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
tradeFive = #{record.tradefive,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
subject = #{record.subject,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
subjectCacheVos = #{record.subjectcachevos,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},

update stock_data
zhangfu = #{zhangfu,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
marketValue = #{marketvalue,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
tradeDate = #{tradedate,jdbcType=DATE},
current = #{current,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
open = #{open,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
high = #{high,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
low = #{low,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
close = #{close,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
preClose = #{preclose,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
pctChg = #{pctchg,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
amplitude = #{amplitude,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
vol = #{vol,jdbcType=BIGINT},
amount = #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
turnoverRate = #{turnoverrate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
limitUp = #{limitup,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
limitDown = #{limitdown,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
limitUpTimes = #{limituptimes,jdbcType=INTEGER},
total = #{total,jdbcType=BIGINT},
circulating = #{circulating,jdbcType=BIGINT},
totalMarketValue = #{totalmarketvalue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
circulatingMarketValue = #{circulatingmarketvalue,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
pe = #{pe,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
pes = #{pes,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
innerDisk = #{innerdisk,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
outerDisk = #{outerdisk,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
fastChg = #{fastchg,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
recentChange = #{recentchange,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
changeCount = #{changecount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
selectDate = #{selectdate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
selfSelectedTime = #{selfselectedtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reportDate = #{reportdate,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reportCount = #{reportcount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qaCount = #{qacount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qaTime = #{qatime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
brokerCount = #{brokercount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
time = #{time,jdbcType=TIME},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
tag = #{tag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
orivalue = #{orivalue,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
nowvalue = #{nowvalue,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
tradeFive = #{tradefive,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
subject = #{subject,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
subjectCacheVos = #{subjectcachevos,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where stockId = #{stockid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update stock_data set zhangfu = #{zhangfu,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, marketValue = #{marketvalue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, tradeDate = #{tradedate,jdbcType=DATE}, current = #{current,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, open = #{open,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, high = #{high,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, low = #{low,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, close = #{close,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, preClose = #{preclose,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, pctChg = #{pctchg,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amplitude = #{amplitude,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, vol = #{vol,jdbcType=BIGINT}, amount = #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, turnoverRate = #{turnoverrate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, limitUp = #{limitup,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, limitDown = #{limitdown,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, limitUpTimes = #{limituptimes,jdbcType=INTEGER}, total = #{total,jdbcType=BIGINT}, circulating = #{circulating,jdbcType=BIGINT}, totalMarketValue = #{totalmarketvalue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, circulatingMarketValue = #{circulatingmarketvalue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, pe = #{pe,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, pes = #{pes,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, innerDisk = #{innerdisk,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, outerDisk = #{outerdisk,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, fastChg = #{fastchg,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, recentChange = #{recentchange,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, changeCount = #{changecount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, selectDate = #{selectdate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, selfSelectedTime = #{selfselectedtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reportDate = #{reportdate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reportCount = #{reportcount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qaCount = #{qacount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qaTime = #{qatime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, brokerCount = #{brokercount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, time = #{time,jdbcType=TIME}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, tag = #{tag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, orivalue = #{orivalue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, nowvalue = #{nowvalue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, tradeFive = #{tradefive,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, subject = #{subject,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, subjectCacheVos = #{subjectcachevos,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where stockId = #{stockid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update stock_data set zhangfu = #{zhangfu,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, marketValue = #{marketvalue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, tradeDate = #{tradedate,jdbcType=DATE}, current = #{current,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, open = #{open,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, high = #{high,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, low = #{low,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, close = #{close,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, preClose = #{preclose,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, pctChg = #{pctchg,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, amplitude = #{amplitude,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, vol = #{vol,jdbcType=BIGINT}, amount = #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, turnoverRate = #{turnoverrate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, limitUp = #{limitup,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, limitDown = #{limitdown,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, limitUpTimes = #{limituptimes,jdbcType=INTEGER}, total = #{total,jdbcType=BIGINT}, circulating = #{circulating,jdbcType=BIGINT}, totalMarketValue = #{totalmarketvalue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, circulatingMarketValue = #{circulatingmarketvalue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, pe = #{pe,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, pes = #{pes,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, innerDisk = #{innerdisk,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, outerDisk = #{outerdisk,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, fastChg = #{fastchg,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, recentChange = #{recentchange,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, changeCount = #{changecount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, selectDate = #{selectdate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, selfSelectedTime = #{selfselectedtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reportDate = #{reportdate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reportCount = #{reportcount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qaCount = #{qacount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qaTime = #{qatime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, brokerCount = #{brokercount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, time = #{time,jdbcType=TIME}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, tag = #{tag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, orivalue = #{orivalue,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, nowvalue = #{nowvalue,jdbcType=DECIMAL} where stockId = #{stockid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
